StudentCheckIn.title: Student Check-In
StudentCheckIn.description: A record of a student's emotional check-in session.

date.description: The ISO timestamp of the check-in.

emotion.description: The ID of the initial emotion selected.

intensity.description: The intensity level (0-10) of the initial emotion.

description.description: The student's description of their situation.

postCoolDownEmotion.description: The ID of the emotion after cool-down.

AIQueue.title: AI Request Queue
AIQueue.description: Used to limit concurrent AI processing for rate limiting.

/checkins/{checkinId}.description: Collection of all student emotional check-ins.

/ai_queue/{requestId}.description: Queue for limiting concurrent AI requests.
